# external references

The requested reference repository should live here when network access is
available:

```bash
git clone https://github.com/Stability-AI/stable-virtual-camera.git external/stable-virtual-camera
```

In this sandbox the shell could not resolve `github.com`, so the local clone was
not created during scaffolding. The evaluation project under `eval_bench/` is
standalone and does not import or require the reference repository.
